resources.string: MeshAI needs location access to discover nearby mesh nodes via Wi-Fi Direct.
MeshAI needs Bluetooth access to advertise and discover nearby AI agent nodes via BLE.
MeshAI needs SMS access so your AI agent can send messages on your behalf when you\'re unavailable.
MeshAI needs notification access to read and respond to your notifications in Agent Mode.
MeshAI needs camera access for monitoring tasks defined by you.
